footer.disclaimer: Only stations reporting prices to DGEG. Some stations may not appear.

calculator.title: How much will my tank cost?

chart.collecting: Collecting data — chart will appear after a few days.
chart.noData: No data available. Data is collected daily.

priceBreakdown.title: How is the price formed?
priceBreakdown.taxNote: ~55% of the final price are taxes (ISP + VAT)

methodology.title: How does the forecast work?
methodology.text: In Portugal, fuel prices update on Mondays. The forecast is based on Platts international quotations, EUR/USD exchange rate, Brent price, and taxes (ISP + VAT at 23%). ENSE publishes daily reference prices. Each station freely sets its final price.

map.geoNotSupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
map.geoFailed: Unable to get your location. Check permissions.
map.noResults: No stations found. Try changing the filters.
map.tapNearMe: Tap Near me to see the cheapest stations in your area.

stats.title: Price Statistics
stats.subtitle: Historical evolution of average fuel prices in Portugal.
stats.emptyText: Historical data is collected daily and automatically. Configure Supabase and wait for data collection to see the charts.
stats.setup2: 2. Run the SQL to create tables (see /about)
stats.setup4: 4. The cron job collects data automatically at 8pm
stats.checkSources: In the meantime, check the official sources:

hero.wait: You can wait — price will drop.
hero.stableAdvice: Price is stable — fill up whenever.
